ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the game was held */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition of the game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the game (Summer/Winter) */,
  "organizing_committee" TEXT /* Name of the organizing committee */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening ceremony */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing ceremony */,
  "num_participating_countries" INTEGER /* Number of participating countries */,
  "num_athletes" INTEGER /* Number of athletes participating */,
  "num_events" INTEGER /* Number of events in the games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "history" TEXT /* Brief history of the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the discipline belongs to */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the discipline */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used in the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplines_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "nocs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the NOC the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Primary sport of the athlete */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_nocs_id FOREIGN KEY ("nocs_id") REFERENCES nocs ("nocs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nocs" (
  "nocs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NOC */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the NOC */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the NOC */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the NOC was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the NOC's headquarters */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the current president of the NOC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nocs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the event */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discipline the event belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event start */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event end */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the event is held */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medal */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the medal */,
  "designer" TEXT /* Name of the medal designer */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the medal is made of */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the medal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medal */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score or time achieved by the athlete */,
  "record" TEXT /* Whether the result set a record (e.g., world record, Olympic record) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_medal_id FOREIGN KEY ("medal_id") REFERENCES medals ("medal_id")
)
column_names: City where the game was held
Number of events in the games
ID of the sport the discipline belongs to
ID of the NOC the athlete belongs to
Date of birth of the athlete
URL to the athlete's profile image
Name of the current president of the NOC
ID of the discipline the event belongs to
Date and time of the event start
Date and time of the event end
Venue where the event is held
Material the medal is made of
Rank of the athlete in the event
Score or time achieved by the athlete
Whether the result set a record (e.g., world record, Olympic record)
